jobProfile.title: Job Profile
jobProfile.description: Defines the requirements for a job role.

name.description: Name of the profile (e.g., Senior Frontend Developer)

field.description: The industry or field (e.g., Software Engineering)

uid.description: The user ID who created the profile

screeningResult.title: Screening Result
screeningResult.description: The result of a CV screening against a job profile.

candidateName.description: Name of the candidate extracted from CV

summary.description: A quick summary of the candidate's profile

jobProfileId.description: ID of the job profile used for screening

uid.description: The user ID who performed the screening
